roles.content: Logical positivism: A comprehensive examination of logical positivism within History of Philosophy, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
Critical perspectives on logical positivism: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to logical positivism.
Recent developments in logical positivism: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of logical positivism in contemporary philosophy.
roles.source: British Journal for the History of Philosophy
